steps.description: Click the "OpenAI" option in the dropdown of the "Service for Large Language Model (LLM)" modal window to select the OpenAI-based service.

Type 'faked_openapi_key' into the input field within the modal titled "Input OpenAI service key now or set it later in the project" in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface of Visual Studio Code.
Press the 'Enter' key to confirm entering the OpenAI service key in the VS Code input dialog displaying the message: "Input OpenAI service key now or set it later in the project."
